findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
mod.ts has 9 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
exported function 'computeContentHash' uses non-standard prefix 'compute' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'safeStat' uses non-standard prefix 'safe' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'safeReadFile' uses non-standard prefix 'safe' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
3 inline *_test.ts files outside tests/ — consolidate under tests/<layer>/
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
